title: SARIF AI emit profile — rule descriptor object (--rules)
description: Input contract for a SARIF reportingDescriptor an AI producer supplies to add-reporting-descriptor --rules (target run.tool.driver.rules[]). Beyond the non-empty string id SARIF §3.49.3 requires, the --rules path is reserved for novel-finding descriptors: the id must begin with the NOVEL- escape-hatch prefix. Taxonomy-mapped rule descriptors (e.g. CWE-89) come from the finalize-time taxonomy enricher, not this verb.

id.description: Novel-finding descriptor id. Must start with 'NOVEL-' (the verb's IsNovel prefix gate). This pins the prefix only, not the full novel grammar, so 'NOVEL-foo/bar' is accepted here even though the richer result-side ruleId grammar rejects it.
